ofm.title: OnlyFans tightening AI rules in 2026
ofm.summary: Platform implementing stringent new policies on AI-generated content verification and management. Creators using AI will face new compliance requirements.

ofm.title: Hybrid AI chatbot model is the winning playbook
ofm.summary: Substy.ai reports AI handles greetings, small talk, reactivation (saving 70% of team time) while humans handle PPV negotiations and loyal fan relationships. This combo maximizes both speed and emotional impact.

ofm.title: Higgsfield launching AI influencer monetization
ofm.summary: New "Earn Creator Program" pays AI influencers via unique referral codes. Platform actively recruiting AI persona creators for monetization.

ofm.title: AI influencer system doing $4K/month documented
ofm.summary: Medium writeup details the "architect" model—instead of being the creator, build the AI persona that gains followers and earns affiliate revenue while you sleep. 150K followers achieved in months.

ofm.title: Fanvue allows AI models with TOS compliance
ofm.summary: Platform permits AI-generated content but creators must stay clear on terms. Agencies combining human creators with AI-assisted models for volume management.

tools.title: Claude Code now runs autonomously with Scheduled Tasks
tools.summary: Anthropic released scheduled task automation—Claude Code can run tasks on a schedule in the background without manual prompting. This is a major shift from reactive to proactive AI agents.

tools.title: OpenClaw 2.26 secrets management overhaul
tools.summary: New external secrets workflow eliminates API keys in plain text configs—major security upgrade for self-hosted deployments.

tools.title: OpenClaw 2026.3.13 adds browser integration + mobile redesign
tools.summary: New browser control features, redesigned mobile interfaces, and gateway environment improvements for AI agents.

tools.title: Claude Code 2 adds /loop command
tools.summary: Automate repetitive tasks within active sessions—process data or check file updates at set intervals (e.g., every 30 minutes).

tools.title: Moonshot AI open-sourced Kimi K2.5
tools.summary: Trillion-parameter model built specifically for multimodal agent workflows—January 2026 release signals the shift toward agent-native model architectures.

market.title: Puerto Escondido air connectivity expanding fast
market.summary: Volaris launching Tijuana-Puerto Escondido route June 2, 2026. Additional Canadian and US connections planned for 2026, extending the addressable buyer/visitor market significantly.

market.title: Puerto Escondido rental market: wellness + nomads driving premium
market.summary: Properties with private pools and multi-bedroom layouts capturing high-value group bookings. Digital nomad infrastructure (coworking, internet) deepening long-stay demand—most valuable occupancy stabilizer.

market.title: Casa Wabi completed OMA domed pavilion March 4, 2026
market.summary: Major architectural completion in Beno's neighborhood (Palmarito area) reinforces the region's cultural cachet and draws continued high-end tourism/attention.

market.title: Rammed earth construction trending in contemporary Mexican architecture
market.summary: ArchDaily reports renewed attention on earthen materials (adobe, rammed earth, compressed earth blocks) by contemporary architects—validates Beno's Sirewall training direction.

market.title: Tulum ATV tours at $250/person for premium packages
market.summary: Market sustaining high per-person pricing for bundled experiences (ruins + ATV + cenote). Quality personalized service commands premium.

actions.text: Test Claude Code Scheduled Tasks: for OFM automation workflows (daily content scheduling, creator performance checks)
Review OnlyFans AI policy changes: audit any AI-assisted content/comms in the agency for compliance with new 2026 rules
Evaluate Higgsfield Earn program: potential new platform for AI influencer revenue streams
Monitor Puerto Escondido flight announcements: additional US/Canada routes will shift tourism demographics; adjust Lagoon Company marketing timing
Update OpenClaw to 2.26+: to leverage secrets management and browser control features for agent workflows
